definition: Renunciation as a freeing orientation away from sensual pull and toward release.
notes: The project prefers renunciation because it is established, readable, and works across both practical and path-factor contexts. Going forth is acceptable where the line leans more toward the movement away from entanglement than toward the settled quality of renunciation.

context_rules.context: In explanatory prose emphasizing movement away from entanglement

example_phrases.notes: Core link to the path-factor framework.
